title: Start building with Nano Banana 2 Lite and Gemini Omni Flash
friendlyTitle: Google adds faster image and video AI tools
summary: Google DeepMind released Nano Banana 2 Lite for faster, lower-cost image generation and opened Gemini Omni Flash for video generation and conversational video editing through developer tools. Google frames the pair as a way to chain fast image ideation into video creation workflows.
friendlySummary: Google released a cheaper image model and a video model that developers can use in apps.
whyItMatters: Generative media is becoming a pipeline, not a one-off prompt box. Lower latency and clearer API pricing matter for marketers, creators, app developers, and product teams that need many iterations rather than a single polished demo.
friendlyWhyItMatters: This could make it easier and cheaper to create pictures and videos for work, learning, and creative projects.
